features: Christmas Winter Place Cards: This pack includes 120 count blank white paper folded place cards with an elegant die cut Christmas silver snowflake design with dots and snowflakes. Our die cut winter snowflake seating name card set can be applied as exquisite decorations on the table with everyone's name written on them, or label your Christmas buffet with these elegant snowflake labels, enough quantity to meet the needs of you and your family.

High Quality: Our winter snowflake table place cards for Xmas are made of the highest quality paper card stock for a sturdy and premium feel. The cards are blank and has just enough room for your messages. Die cut winter snowflake tent cards measure approximately 3.5 x 2 inches folded, 3.5 x 4 unfolded. The proper size to be easily noticed and placed on the table, with enough space in front to fill in personalized information such as table number, guest name, food name, etc.

Exquisite Design: Our die cut Snowflake place cards are featuring the Christmas theme and patterned with silver snowflakes, looking simple but elegant and showing rich festive vibe, can well fit for many different occasions. It will make your party table more attractive and full of Christmas Holiday atmosphere.

Multipurpose Use: Use these winter snowflake place cards with place card holders, on a seating chart board, for flower arrangement card holders, reservation cards, or as food cards for buffet table. Also great with Christmas card holder picks or tall gold table card holders.

For All Occasions: Christmas name place cards with winter snowflake design are great for Christmas weddings, baby shower seating cards, tea table settings and food labels, Christmas dinner parties, rustic place settings, birthday place cards, escort card display, Christmas theme parties, graduation placement, food labels for banquets or buffets etc, giving your party a formal feel and showing your respect and welcome to your visiting guests.
